productName: Liv Templ Infused Pre-roll Blue Raspberry Cough - 1g
description: A sativa pre-roll of Blue Raspberry Cough supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a sweet, tart raspberry flavor, with a bright, heady lift. A little goes a long way.
